about_item: NO MESS, NO FUSS HYDRATION: Keep your dog hydrated anywhere without leaks or complicated parts. Simple but smart design that just works every time
DETACHABLE WIDE BOWL FOR NATURAL DRINKING: Your dog drinks comfortably from a real bowl — not a narrow stream or squeeze dispenser
NO BUTTONS, NO FAILURES: No pumps, no hidden mechanisms, no frustration. A dependable bottle you can trust on every walk
EASY TO CLEAN, NO HIDDEN DIRT: Fully detachable design makes cleaning quick and thorough — no hard-to-reach areas
SAFE & DURABLE TRITAN: BPA-free, lightweight, and built for everyday use indoors or outdoors
PERFECT FOR WALKING, HIKING & TRAVEL: Lightweight, portable, and available in 600ML & 1L sizes for every adventure
WARRANTY & CARE: All of our products come with OllyDog lifetime warranty. Please note that chewing and biting are not covered by warranty, as that is not the intended use of the product

summary.text: Customers find the dog water bottle's design excellent and appreciate its portability, particularly for traveling with pets. Moreover, the bottle's functionality and size receive positive feedback, with one customer noting it's perfect for hot days, and another mentioning it's generous enough for their Siberian Huskies. Additionally, the lid functionality is positive, with one customer describing how the bowl snaps securely onto the bottle. However, durability and leakage receive mixed reviews - while some say it's durable and doesn't leak, others report it shatters on first use and leaks.

insights.title: Design
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the design of the water bottle, finding it to be an excellent quality alternative for their pets.

examples.snippet: This is a great product, good size and so practical. Keep your buddy hidrated when you're walking, even wet his/her paws as well.
Great water bottle for when you and your pup are on the go. The trough fits snug and doesn't come off and the water bottle doesn't leak....
Great idea. Only problem I got distracted at a rest stop and forgot to get the trough. Have to order another one
...But otherwise it’s a great bottle.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers find the water bottle highly portable, making it perfect for traveling with dogs and convenient for walks.

examples.snippet: Bought this for my pupper a few months ago. Great for walks. I like that it’s a good large size and easy to clean. Definitely recommend!
These are amazing and easy to carry even as a one handed individual... the 1L size gets a bit cumbersome... I recommend the smaller size!!!
Love this bottle. Easy to carry and use.
Super convenient to keep in my jeep. I take my dog on a lot of adventures and its nice to have a water bottle that has an attached bowl....

insights.title: Lid functionality
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the bottle's functionality, with multiple reviews noting that the bowl snaps securely onto the bottle and detaches easily when needed.

examples.snippet: ...The lid screws on tight and because it is attached, the plastic connector makes it easy to carry or connect to something with a carabiner....
...The bottle is a quality product made from BPA free plastic. The lid seals well and I have not had a leaking problem rattling around in my car....
The lid was difficult to put on straight & the lid broke in the first few days that I used it.
...I like having a loop to hold onto. The bowl is easily put on and off- Great design!!!...

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find that the water bottle works well, with one mentioning it's great for hikes and another noting that the bowl attachment is functional.

examples.snippet: Good product. Works great. Lost my first one and immediately bought another one.
Works well, cap is a bit hard to screw on --> leaks sometimes.
Slightly smaller than I wanted but it works perfect! Took my dog for a 5 mile hike and this helped keep him hydrated! Easy to clean and use.
Water bottle is durable and works. I'm satisfied - as is my dog.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers like the size of the water bottle, noting it's not too small for beagle and chihuahua dogs and is generous enough for Siberian Huskies.

examples.snippet: ...It's really lightweight and a perfect size.
600ml is smaller than expected, but still good size for short walks. Ordered a 1 l as well. Very happy with the product
This is a great product, good size and so practical. Keep your buddy hidrated when you're walking, even wet his/her paws as well.
Much needed drink for dog walking. Convenient size and operation.

insights.title: Convenience
insights.summary: Customers find the water bottle practical and convenient, with one mentioning that the built-in bowl makes it particularly useful.

examples.snippet: If my dog is with me, this is our water bottle. It's convenient and large enough for both of us to have a drink when we need it....
I love the convenience of this bottle as now we don't have to carry both a water bottle and collapsible bowl....
Well made. Very convenient. And detachable bowl only comes off when I want it to.
Very handy and easy to use. Having the little dish attached is so handy to remove and let dog drying instead of Mekong the drink while pouring.

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the water bottle's durability, with some finding it durable while others report it shattering on first use or breaking within days of use.

examples.snippet: The bottle cap strap breaks easily....
...Bought this bottle a year ago in august 2019 and still sturdy and durable. Whenever we go out with our little pup we always take this bottle....
The mouth leaked. Returned it. Hard plastic easy to break. Rim of lid also was cracked.
So useful! I love this and take it for every walk. It's quite sturdy, easy to clean, and the form factor is really nice -- the size is just right in...

insights.title: Leakage
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the water bottle's leakage: while some report it does not leak, others mention that it does.

examples.snippet: I would give this 5 stars but the bottle leaks unless you close the lid just right and after 5 months of use the part attaching the lid to the...
Great product! Never leaks, definitely one of the best designs I've seen for these kinds of water bottle/dish combos....
Works well, cap is a bit hard to screw on --> leaks sometimes.
...back in if your baby doesn't drink it all and most important DOES NOT leak! Only wish there was pink

authors_reviews.title: Great water bottle - been a customer for 5+ years - highly recommend
authors_reviews.text: I love OllyDog water bottles! The 1-liter size is perfect for my Siberian Huskies, especially on hot summer days—it holds plenty of water and the built-in bowl is super convenient. It’s durable, leak-proof, and far better than any other dog water bottle I’ve tried. I’m only replacing mine because I dropped it on a hike after years of use!
authors_reviews.author: Jessica K

authors_reviews.title: handy bottle and bowl
authors_reviews.text: This is a great combo bowl and bottle in one. It holds a lot more than others I've seen. The bowl comes on and off easily and stays securely in place. It would be nice if it came with a carrying strap as it gets a bit heavy if you're holding it by the cap attachment. I bought the 1 liter and would purchase a larger size if it was offered. It's quite sturdy. I've learned to double check that the cap is tightly fastened as if it isn't, then it will leak. It will often seem closed but isn't quite. Once I give it an extra twist then it's secure.
authors_reviews.author: Tanya

authors_reviews.title: Convenient and streamlined
authors_reviews.text: LIKE: large enough for my 75 lb dog to have several drinks along our walk; 'bowl' concept is amazing and allows me to tuck the bottle inside my bag and no need to carry an awkward bowl anymore; can share the water with your dog (as long as you don't pour the water pack in from the 'bowl'; sleek enough to keep in the refrigerator on the door panel; durable as proven by my several drops on the pavement. DISLIKE: the plastic loop attaching the lid to the bottle broke within the first few weeks. I loved this loop as it allowed me to hook it on my finger during walks. As a dog mom I carry a lot of things - keys, phone, poop bags, and often a beverage for me :) so this loop was key. I tried to super glue it back, no success. That is my only complaint.
authors_reviews.author: Pelligrino45

authors_reviews.title: My dog likes it!
authors_reviews.text: I bought this one liter OllyDog OllyBottle because of the size, design, and color to add to my dog's travel "luggage" (which is also purple). This size bottle fits nicely into the side netted pocket of the carry-on size bag and nestles deep enough that there is no worry of the bottle falling out of the pocket. I wondered, based on the slender shape of the snap on/off bowl portion, if my large dog would use it, but to my delight he took to it like a champ. The bottle is available in 5 colors and 2 sizes. The slender "bowl" is the length and width of the bottle and snaps crisply and snugly onto the side of the bottle. The bottle is easy to clean and marketed to be dishwasher safe. The size is manageable for either small or large hands. The top screws on and off while it is attached to the bottle by a rubber/plastic extension of the cap. I have not used it frequently enough as of yet to assess the longevity of the attachment extension. The entire 3 pieces seem to be sturdy and well constructed. Thus far, both my dog and I can recommend this bottle without reservation.Top 3 Likes:-Compact, portable, with attached bowl-Ease of use and carrying even for small hands-Purple colorTop 3 Dislikes:-Possibility of being tipped over because of the slender shape-Concern that attachment extension from camp to bottle may snap/break-If not correctly and tightly screwed on the cap will leak
authors_reviews.author: Ann

authors_reviews.title: Ollydog Bottle Quench your dogs thirst with this amazing water bottle
authors_reviews.text: I love this bottle. So easy to fill & use. Comes with a detachable dish to pour water in for my fur baby.
authors_reviews.author: Erin V Losse

authors_reviews.title: Very handy for traveling with your dog
authors_reviews.text: Very convenient bottle and bowl design for traveling with your smallish dog. Probably not big enough for a large dog, though the 1 liter size would definitely be better. The bottle is a quality product made from BPA free plastic. The lid seals well and I have not had a leaking problem rattling around in my car. The bowl stays clean due to the bowl opening being snug against the bottle. It’s definitely not an air tight seal, but does a good job staying clean except for fine dust. I would definitely buy another one if the need arises, though I think this one will last a very long time. Recommended.
authors_reviews.author: FrankW

authors_reviews.title: Handy you can both have a drink
authors_reviews.text: I like how it makes a nice dish for the dog that I can pour into and I can drink out of the opening. So I don’t have to get dog lips.More convenient than bringing separate bottles for the two of us or a separate bowl and bottle.
authors_reviews.author: Bob

authors_reviews.title: Best Dog Water bottle
authors_reviews.text: Bottle with a drinking tray all in one.
authors_reviews.author: A. R.

other_countries_reviews.author: Alina Gonzalez

other_countries_reviews.title: Most functional dog waterer available
other_countries_reviews.text: Perfect dog waterer! Expensive, but so happy to have a water solution that he actually uses. It’s durable and has a fantastic design so I’m happy it will very likely last for years. Highly recommend!
other_countries_reviews.author: Catherine Field

other_countries_reviews.title: Awesome for traveling!
other_countries_reviews.text: Awesome for traveling! If you have a big dog you may have to buy a bigger one or buy 2.I opt for buying 2 so I can freeze one and have 1 ready for drinking.
other_countries_reviews.author: Beau

other_countries_reviews.title: It’s a cheap bottle
other_countries_reviews.text: It’s ok not sure worth the money tho
other_countries_reviews.author: stuart hawthorne

other_countries_reviews.title: Great but not for big dogs
other_countries_reviews.text: Great product but definitely not big enough for medium to large dog tongues.
other_countries_reviews.author: Natasha
